Est. 2014 · Rens, Metropolis · A 12-year dynasty founded on spite

Emotionally stable goblins who love rocks

Big Rock Energy [BONK] is a highsec mining & industry alliance. We mine the rock, refine the rock, build with the rock, and sell the thing. The middleman gets nothing. He weeps. We do not care.

01

The Chain

// rocks in → isk out
STEP 01
Mine

You point the laser. The rock does not consent. This is the part you already love.

▶
STEP 02
Refine

The buyback gathers it and the minerals come out. No hauling to Jita like it's 1843.

▶
STEP 03
Build

Our own minerals, our own blueprints. The new frontier, and the big margins live here.

▶
STEP 04
Sell

Finished goods at a margin. ISK appears. A goblin, somewhere, feels useful.

▶
STEP 05
Structures

Better refine, more yield, our own everything. The final goblin form. Coming this season.

02

What you get

// the cape, not the credit card
BOOSTS Real Orca foreman boosts

Fleet up and your numbers jump ≈83% per hour — damn near double, measured. These aren't vibes; this is the live Mining Burst readout:

−45.3% cycle time  →  ~83% more ore/hr +120.8% mining module range +150.9% mining crit success −45.3% residue (less waste)
PAID 90% instant buyback

Mine it, dump it in the buyback, get paid on the spot. The math is already done and the rate is already fair. Hauling is for people without a corp.

FAIR No tax nonsense

Near-zero corp tax — we fund the dynasty on the buyback margin, not your wallet. The crew eats first. Always has.

SAFE We re-ship you

Explode in the field? We hand you a fresh hull out of the Orca's bay and you're back on the rock in minutes. The horror of solo mining ends here.

THIS IS NOT A RECRUITMENT AD

It is a public service announcement that a 12-year highsec mining dynasty with Orca boosts, 90% buyback, fair splits, and a Discord full of people who take the ore seriously and absolutely nothing else simply exists. Do with that information what you will. We are at peace. We have inner peace and also a lot of ISK.

The ore must flow.
The goblins must eat.

Reject the prescribed path. Mine the rock instead.

Come be a goblin ▸
